message:
feat(distributed): implement real weighted symbol assignment strategy

AssignmentStrategy::Weighted previously fell through to the Full
strategy, assigning every symbol to every replica. This defeated the
purpose of weighted distribution when replicas have uneven loads.

The new assign_weighted() implementation:
- Assigns each symbol exactly once (not replicated)
- For each symbol, picks the replica with the lowest projected total
  (existing symbol_count + newly assigned count)
- Ties are broken by fewer new assignments, then by lower index, giving
  deterministic results for identical replica states
- Produces near-perfect balance: with N symbols and R equal-load
  replicas, max - min <= 1

Changes:
- Separate Weighted from the Full match arm in SymbolAssigner::assign()
- Add assign_weighted() private method with greedy least-loaded logic
- Extend assignment_strategies_provide_minimum_coverage test with
  Weighted assertions (total == symbols.len(), balance within 1)
- Update e2e_full_encode_distribute_recover_pipeline to include Weighted
  in the strategy loop and verify total symbol count

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
